narrative:
Wadsworth TWP township has 3,369 registered voters, with 53.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 33.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 20.5 percentage points.
